name: Gaomon

signature_move.name: Rolling Upper
signature_move.description: Exploits its leg strength to roll into the opponent's chest and uppercut it.

description: A Beast Digimon that is thought to be a subspecies of the sharp-clawed Gazimon-species . With its keen movements, it specializes in " Hit and Away " attacks. The gloves on its hands appear to be protecting its claws until they are fully grown. Its Special Moves are utilising its powerful legs and rolling into the opponent's chest ( Rolling Upper ), and its " Double Backhand " that it unleashes while spinning. Also, it can move nimbly to unleash a high-speed barrage of punches ( Gao Rush ).
